---
title: "Step 4 -- HEX data"
format: html
---

<!-- For detailed instructions, see:
     https://worldbank.github.io/devPTIpack/articles/build-pti-4-hex.html -->

::: {.callout-warning}
**Feature not ready.** This step depends on the HEX data API, which is
under active development. Content will be added when the API and
integration functions are production-ready. This is **not** merely
unwritten documentation -- the underlying infrastructure does not yet
exist.

This file ships as a stub. `00-master.R` does **not** render it.
:::

## What this step will do

Once the HEX track lands, this step will:

1. Fetch pre-computed H3 res-6 hex data for your country via
   `fetch_hex_data()`.
2. Let you explore and select variables interactively via
   `app_explore_hex()` (a standalone mini Shiny app).
3. Match selected hex variables to your shapefile polygons and
   generate a standalone metadata workbook via
   `create_hex_metadata(shp, vars)`.
4. Save the result to `app-data/metadata-hex.xlsx` so Step 5's
   `compile_pti_data()` can merge it with the user workbook from
   Step 3.

## Ordering note

This step is **order-flexible** -- it can be run before or after
Step 3. The two outputs (`metadata-user.xlsx` and `metadata-hex.xlsx`)
are independent intermediate files merged together in Step 5.

## Tracking

The HEX integration is tracked under the arch-09 design document
([`.github/docs/arch-09-documentation.md`](https://github.com/worldbank/devPTIpack/blob/main/.github/docs/arch-09-documentation.md))
section 4.5 / 6, and the corresponding feature branch is `feat/hex-integration`.
